what_was_done: Diagnosed and fixed Alibaba-NLP/gte-multilingual-base model crash. Root cause: torch 2.10 meta-device init corrupts 4 non-persistent buffers (position_ids, inv_freq, cos_cached, sin_cached). Applied full buffer patch in _init_chromadb() — re-registers all 4 after model load. Switched _EMBEDDING_MODEL from thenlper/gte-base (512 tokens) to Alibaba-NLP/gte-multilingual-base (8192 tokens, ~68% MTEB). Updated tests. 1308 passed, 0 failed. Migration runs on next MCP restart.
